title: Shield Durability Overlay
description: A Resource Pack To Display Your Shield's Durability, Perfect For PvP!
body: ## **!! [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/) IS REQUIRED !! [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/) FOR FABRIC IS REQUIRED !!** --- ## What Is This? This Is a Resource Pack That Contains `Shield Durability Overlay`. This Durability Helps You To Visualize The Remaining Durability Of Your Elytra. It Can Be Used To Determine The Remaining Durability Of Your Enemy or Your Elytra During Normal Usage Or PvP. ## Features 1. Has 8 Colors, Goes From Green To Purple, Perfectly Accurate Indicator.\ (Green > Green-Yellow > Yellow > Yellow-Orange > Orange > Orange-Red > Red > Purple)\ Green Being The Highest Durability & Purple Being The Lowest Durability. 2. Durability Overlay Is Not Shown While The Shield Is At Full Durability Making It Less Obstructive. ## FAQ 1. Why Does The Pack Show "Incompatible Version" & Is Red? - Ans: You Might Be On a Version That Is Not Listed Inside The Pack So It Shows Up As Incompatible Version. You Should Try It First Then If It Works Then Yay, If It Doesn't... Well Then It Doesn't! ## Socials --- (dont mind the VERY HIGH QUALITY logo, peak content hehe xD)
